seo.title: Status — is Geek Engine up?
seo.description: Live status for Geek Engine. We probe the app platform from our edge and report whether it's operational, plus the status of this marketing site.

hero.heading: Is everything running?
hero.sub: We check the app platform from our edge every minute or so and report what we see — honestly, including when we can't reach it.

note: This check probes a lightweight health endpoint on the app platform. An amber result means our edge couldn't reach it just now; it doesn't always mean the platform is down for everyone.

ctaStrip.heading: Want incident notes?
ctaStrip.sub: Geek Engine isn't live yet. Subscribe for launch and reliability updates.
